channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Honey as a Natural Energy Source for Exercise Routines
item.description: The article explores how honey can serve as an effective natural energy source for athletes and fitness enthusiasts. It explains that honey, composed of glucose and fructose, provides rapid energy dur...

item.title: China Successfully Recovers First Stage of CZ-10B Rocket in Historic Space Achievement
item.description: On July 10, 2026, China marked a significant milestone in its space program with the successful launch and recovery of the CZ-10B rocket's first stage. Developed by the China Aerospace Science and Tec...

item.title: Family's Attorney Questions Official Explanation of Nolan Wells' Death
item.description: The article discusses the ongoing controversy surrounding the death of Nolan Wells, with his family's attorney, Ben Crump, publicly criticizing the official explanation provided by authorities. Crump,...

item.title: Strategies for Poilievre to Challenge Carney's Leadership in Canada
item.description: The article discusses the political challenges facing Canadian Conservative leader Pierre Poilievre as he seeks to counter Prime Minister Justin Trudeau’s Liberal government. It highlights key strateg...

item.title: Chadema Disciplines Leaders Who Accused Party Chairman
item.description: Chadema, Tanzania's main opposition party, has initiated disciplinary measures against several leaders who publicly accused chairman Freeman Mbowe (Heche) of misconduct. The action aims to restore uni...

item.title: BOC Seizes P14.2 Million Shabu Hidden in Rope Shipment
item.description: The Bureau of Customs (BOC) at Ninoy Aquino International Airport intercepted a parcel from Cambodia containing 2,102 grams of suspected shabu valued at P14.29 million. The shipment, declared as plast...

item.title: Government Allows Private Vaccination Against Foot and Mouth Disease for South African Farmers
item.description: The South African government has reached a settlement with farming sector representatives, allowing farmers to privately vaccinate their livestock against Foot and Mouth Disease (FMD). Minister of Agr...

item.title: VP JD Vance leases Virginia farm for family residence near Washington
item.description: U.S. Vice President JD Vance is leasing a portion of the Wolver Hill Farm, a sprawling property spanning nearly 500 acres in Middleburg, Virginia, to serve as an additional residence for his family. T...

item.title: Trapped in the flames: Spanish residents face deadly escape during wildfire
item.description: In southern Spain, residents of rural Andalusian villages faced a harrowing dilemma as a wildfire rapidly advanced towards their homes. Local authorities urged people to stay indoors and endure the th...

item.title: Chris Packham’s exploration of evolution: from single cells to complex life
item.description: Chris Packham's BBC series 'Evolution' delves into the origins of life, tracing evolutionary processes through diverse species and ecosystems. The show challenges viewers to question humanity's role i...

item.title: Economic Challenges Push Young Adults to Delay Marriage and Parenthood
item.description: A UNFPA study reveals that young adults globally are delaying marriage and parenthood due to financial pressures and job insecurity, despite still wanting families. The report, based on surveys from 1...

item.title: Nigeria's Stock Market Surges N9.34trn in Week of Heavy Buying
item.description: The Nigerian equities market had a major rebound this week, adding over N9.34 trillion to investor portfolios. The market cap of the Nigerian Exchange Limited (NGX) jumped from N147.103 trillion to N1...

item.title: Microsoft's Daughter's Shopping App Allegedly Used Fake Clicks to Boost Sales
item.description: Phia, an advertising startup co-founded by Phoebe Gates (daughter of Bill Gates), has been accused of using fake clicks to falsely claim sales for its 'personal shopping assistant' app. The app, desig...

item.title: Orlando Pirates release goalkeeper Melusi Buthelezi ahead of Spain pre-season tour
item.description: Orlando Pirates have officially parted ways with goalkeeper Melusi Buthelezi, as confirmed by the club's social media announcement. Buthelezi, who joined the team three seasons ago from TS Galaxy, had...

item.title: Mornington Peninsula weather forecast for tomorrow: mostly cloudy with late showers and strong northerly winds
item.description: Residents of the Mornington Peninsula can expect mostly cloudy conditions tomorrow with a late shower possible and strong northerly winds. According to the latest forecast from the Bureau of Meteorolo...

item.title: New Swimming Dock Added in Ottawa-Gatineau
item.description: The National Capital Commission (NCC) has unveiled a new swimming dock in Ottawa-Gatineau, expanding recreational facilities for residents during the summer months. This development comes as part of o...

item.title: Key Tech and Travel Stocks Face Market Volatility
item.description: The Wall Street Journal's live coverage highlights critical developments in the stock market, focusing on SK Hynix, EasyJet, and Vodafone. SK Hynix, a leading memory chip manufacturer, faces pressure ...

item.title: NHCP rejects China's sovereignty claims over Batanes, cites historical records and Philippine jurisdiction
item.description: The National Historical Commission of the Philippines (NHCP) has firmly rejected claims that Batanes belongs to China, describing the assertions as baseless, unsupported by credible historical evidenc...

item.title: Construction Site Collapse Claims One Life, Injures Seven Workers in Gombe
item.description: A section of the new Gombe State House of Assembly complex collapsed on Friday, killing one construction worker and injuring seven others. The incident occurred at the project site when a part of the ...

item.title: Erling Haaland's Viral Popularity and Social Media Success During the World Cup
item.description: Erling Haaland, the Norwegian striker for Manchester City, has become the most viral player of the 2026 World Cup due to his off-pitch content and social media presence. While he competes for the Gold...
